mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inquiry ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO response (inquiry_id, ad_id, response_content, created_at) VALUES (#{inquiry_id}, #{ad_id}, #{response_content}, #{created_at})
mapper.select: SELECT i.inquiry_id, i.member_idx, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.status, i.created_at, i.processed_at, m.member_id AS member_id, r.ad_id AS ad_id, r.created_at AS response_created_at FROM inquiry i JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx LEFT JOIN response r ON i.inquiry_id = r.inquiry_id WHERE i.inquiry_id = #{inquiry_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry WHERE status = '접수'
